title: Potato
description: just a random resource pack that potato-ifes minecraft
body:
# Potato
![Preview image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6090e05c38ced4be11a5898e0637cae832a5e1.png)
## Comparison Vanilla vs Potato
| Vanilla             | Potato pack           |
|:-------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Diamond             | Potato                |
| Emerald             | Potato                |
| Diamond sword       | Potato on a stick     |
| Crosshair           | Potato                |
| Sun                 | Potato                |
| More normal stuff   | Potato                |
## FAQ:
- Where can i report bugs?
> You cannot.
- Why are some items more pixelated than they should be?
> This texture pack is made in Microsoft Paint.
- Why did you make this?
> I don't know. Also potatoes are cool.

## Known bugs:
- Some items being more pixelated than they should be(Bedrock and java) - Wont fix
